name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Car title loan lender in Memphis, TN offering $100–$50,000 same-day loans to borrowers with bad credit or past bankruptcies who own a vehicle.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is a consumer lending company operating a branch at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee. The company operates under the cartitleloansla.com domain, indicating regional operations across multiple states. The Memphis location serves borrowers seeking secured financing and positions itself explicitly for consumers excluded from traditional credit channels due to poor credit scores or past bankruptcies. Its primary marketing promise—'sign up by noon, get cash today'—reflects its positioning as an emergency and fast-access lender.

The core product is a car title loan, in which the borrower's vehicle title serves as collateral while the borrower retains use of the vehicle during the repayment period. Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000, covering both small emergency cash needs and larger financing requirements. The process follows three steps: apply online, receive cash while keeping the car, then repay the loan to reclaim the title. The Memphis office is reachable at 1-888-903-0217 and service@swiftloans.com. Online transactions are protected with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption.

Customer reviews consistently cite a staff member named Alfred as a standout at the Memphis branch, praised repeatedly for patience, clear explanations of loan terms, and guiding borrowers through paperwork without confusing jargon. Office hours are broader than many title lenders—Monday through Friday 9am to 7pm, and Saturday 10am to 5pm—giving working borrowers more scheduling flexibility. The physical office is described across multiple reviews as clean, welcoming, and professional in atmosphere.

Swift Title Loans serves a real need for Memphis-area car owners who have been declined by conventional lenders. That said, title loans as a product category carry meaningful financial risk: the vehicle used as collateral can be repossessed upon default, and APRs on title loans are typically far higher than personal loans or credit union alternatives. Customer feedback also indicates the digital experience lags behind in-branch service—reviewers specifically requested a mobile payment app, text reminders for payment due dates, more payment plan options, and clearer exterior signage. Borrowers should review the full APR and repayment terms carefully before committing.
pros: Same-day cash available for applications submitted before noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit scores and past bankruptcies
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle while the loan is outstanding
Wide loan range of $100–$50,000 accommodates both small and larger cash needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS encryption protect online applications
Staff member Alfred consistently praised across reviews for patience and clear explanations
cons: Vehicle title is held as collateral — default can result in repossession
No mobile app for payment management, requested by multiple reviewers
Exterior signage described as unclear for first-time visitors
Parking lot reported as crowded during peak hours
Closed Sundays with no 24/7 digital self-service option
best_for: Car owners with bad credit or past bankruptcies needing same-day emergency cash
Memphis-area borrowers who have been turned down by traditional lenders
Borrowers needing more than $1,000 who have a vehicle to use as collateral
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance through the loan application process
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for Memphis-area car owners who need fast cash and have been rejected by traditional lenders due to poor credit or bankruptcy history. The main caveat is that title loans are a high-cost credit product — borrowers risk vehicle repossession if they miss payments, and should compare the full APR against credit union PALs or CDFI alternatives before applying.
services: Loans for applicants with bad credit
Loans for applicants with prior bankruptcies
In-person loan processing at Memphis branch
Loan repayment and title return processing
